# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest version of golangci-lint is supported.

We will only release security updates for the latest version.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We want to keep our software safe for everyone.

If you've discovered a security vulnerability in golangci-lint,
we appreciate your help in disclosing it to us in a responsible manner,
by creating a [security advisory](https://github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/security/advisories).
